title: Nimai Technologies — AI EdTech Corporate Website

requirements.text: Implement a sticky header navigation bar with the Nimai Technologies Private Limited brand name/logo on the left and navigation links (Home, About, Services, Why Choose Us, Contact) on the right. Include a hamburger menu for mobile viewports. Apply glassmorphism styling with a corporate blue + deep indigo color palette.

quotes: Corporate blue + deep indigo gradient theme

acceptanceCriteria: Header remains fixed at the top while scrolling on all screen sizes
Navigation links smooth-scroll to the corresponding section
Hamburger menu appears on screens below 768px and toggles a mobile nav drawer
Header uses glassmorphism backdrop-filter with blue/indigo gradient tones

requirements.text: Build a Hero section with: H1 headline 'Revolutionizing Institutional Intelligence with AI', a subheading 'Empowering Business Schools & Agencies with Smart Automation & Predictive Intelligence', a primary CTA button 'Request Institutional Demo' linking to the Contact section, a secondary CTA button 'Talk to Our AI Experts' linking to WhatsApp (https://wa.me/91XXXXXXXXXX?text=Hello%20Nimai%20Technologies%2C%20I%20would%20like%20to%20talk%20to%20your%20AI%20Experts.), and a subtle animated gradient or tech-inspired particle/grid background.

quotes: Bold headline: "Revolutionizing Institutional Intelligence with AI"
Secondary CTA: "Talk to Our AI Experts"
Background: Subtle animated gradient or tech-inspired pattern

acceptanceCriteria: H1 text matches exactly: 'Revolutionizing Institutional Intelligence with AI'
Subheading text is present and readable on all screen sizes
Primary CTA scrolls to the Contact section
Secondary CTA opens WhatsApp with the pre-filled message
Background animation runs smoothly without causing layout shift

requirements.text: Build an About Us section with H2 title 'Bridging Traditional Pedagogy with Cutting-Edge AI'. Include descriptive paragraphs covering: domain expertise in education & institutional consulting, AI-driven transformation, secure data architecture, ethical AI compliance, and a vision statement about reducing administrative burden and maximizing student learning impact. Include 3 highlight cards labeled 'Innovation', 'Security', and 'Institutional Growth', each with a relevant icon and short description.

quotes: Title: Bridging Traditional Pedagogy with Cutting-Edge AI
Add 3 highlight cards: Innovation | Security | Institutional Growth

acceptanceCriteria: Section has proper H2 heading matching the specified title
All five content themes (expertise, transformation, security, ethics, vision) are addressed in the copy
Three cards for Innovation, Security, and Institutional Growth are displayed in a responsive grid
Cards have icons, titles, and short descriptions

requirements.text: Build a Services section with H2 title 'Our Services'. Display 5 service cards, each with a title, short description, and a 'Learn More' or 'Get Started' CTA button that opens WhatsApp with a pre-filled message in the format: 'Hello Nimai Technologies, I am interested in [Service Name]. Please share more details.' The five services are: (1) Custom LLM Integration for Institutions, (2) Admission Automation & Smart Application Filtering, (3) Predictive Analytics for Student Success, (4) AI-powered Academic Intelligence Dashboard, (5) Data Security & Compliance Architecture. WhatsApp base URL: https://wa.me/91XXXXXXXXXX

quotes: Each service must have a short description and a CTA button
Must redirect to WhatsApp with pre-filled message: "Hello Nimai Technologies, I am interested in [Service Name]. Please share more details."

acceptanceCriteria: All 5 service cards are rendered with title, description, and CTA button
Each CTA button opens a WhatsApp link with the correct pre-filled message substituting the actual service name
Cards display in a responsive grid (1 column mobile, 2–3 columns desktop)
Service names match the specified list exactly

requirements.text: Build a 'Why Choose Us' section with H2 title 'Why Choose Nimai Technologies'. Display 5 feature highlights as icon + title + short description cards: (1) Reduced Administrative Workload, (2) AI-Driven Decision Making, (3) Secure Infrastructure, (4) Future-Proof Technology, (5) Scalable Institutional Solutions.
acceptanceCriteria: All 5 feature highlights are rendered with icon, title, and description
Section has a clear H2 heading
Layout is responsive across mobile and desktop

requirements.text: Build a Contact section with H2 title 'Get In Touch'. Include a form with fields: Institution Name, Contact Person, Email, Phone, and Message. On form submission, instead of sending an email, construct a WhatsApp URL with all form field values auto-filled into a pre-formatted message and redirect the user to that WhatsApp link. WhatsApp base URL: https://wa.me/91XXXXXXXXXX. Also include a direct WhatsApp CTA button on the page.

quotes: Form submission must redirect to WhatsApp with auto-filled message including the entered details
Fields: Institution Name, Contact Person, Email, Phone, Message

acceptanceCriteria: Form renders all 5 fields: Institution Name, Contact Person, Email, Phone, Message
On submit, a WhatsApp URL is constructed with all field values included in the message text
User is redirected to the WhatsApp link on submission
Basic client-side validation prevents submission with empty required fields

requirements.text: Build a Footer with: Nimai Technologies Private Limited company name, Quick Links column (Home, About, Services, Why Choose Us, Contact), Services Links column listing all 5 services, a WhatsApp contact button, copyright notice, and links to Privacy Policy and Terms & Conditions dummy pages. Create two stub pages (privacy-policy and terms-and-conditions) with placeholder legal text.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer contains company name, two link columns, WhatsApp button, and copyright line
Privacy Policy and Terms & Conditions links are present and navigate to their respective stub pages
Stub pages include placeholder content and a back/home navigation link
Footer is responsive and stacks columns on mobile

requirements.text: Implement full SEO setup across all pages: add a descriptive meta title ('Nimai Technologies | AI-Powered Institutional Intelligence Platform'), meta description targeting keywords (AI for Business Schools, Institutional AI Platform, Education AI Automation, AI Admission System, Academic Predictive Analytics), Open Graph tags (og:title, og:description, og:type, og:url, og:image), Twitter Card meta tags, JSON-LD Organization schema markup, proper H1/H2/H3 heading hierarchy throughout, and a favicon. Generate a sitemap.xml and robots.txt in the public root.

quotes: SEO-friendly structure (semantic HTML, meta tags, Open Graph, structured data)
Keyword optimization: AI for Business Schools, Institutional AI Platform, Education AI Automation, AI Admission System, Academic Predictive Analytics

acceptanceCriteria: Meta title and description are present in the HTML head
Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags are present
JSON-LD Organization schema is embedded in a <script type='application/ld+json'> block
Headings follow a logical H1 > H2 > H3 hierarchy with no skipped levels
sitemap.xml and robots.txt files are present in the public directory
A favicon is linked in the HTML head

requirements.text: Apply a cohesive visual design system: corporate blue (#1E3A8A range) and deep indigo (#312E81 / #4F46E5 range) gradient theme, glassmorphism cards (frosted glass effect with backdrop-filter), clean whitespace, smooth scroll behavior, subtle CSS entrance animations (fade-in / slide-up on scroll), hover lift animations on cards and buttons, professional sans-serif typography (e.g., Inter or similar), and consistent spacing throughout all sections.

quotes: Corporate blue + deep indigo gradient theme
glassmorphism / subtle gradients / minimal corporate aesthetic
Add smooth scrolling and subtle animations

acceptanceCriteria: Blue and indigo gradient palette is applied consistently across the site
Cards use glassmorphism styling with visible backdrop-filter or semi-transparent backgrounds
Smooth scroll is enabled site-wide
Cards and buttons have visible hover animations
Typography is clean, professional, and readable at all breakpoints

requirements.text: Generate a hero background image: a futuristic tech-inspired dark blue/indigo abstract pattern with subtle glowing neural network nodes, grid lines, and geometric shapes suitable as a full-width section background.

quotes: Background: Subtle animated gradient or tech-inspired pattern

acceptanceCriteria: Hero background image is referenced as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated/
Image renders without distortion at full viewport width on both desktop and mobile

constraints: WhatsApp number placeholder 91XXXXXXXXXX must be kept as a clearly visible placeholder in the code so it can be easily replaced with the real number before deployment.
No backend logic required — all form submissions and CTAs are handled client-side via WhatsApp URL redirects.
The corporate blue + deep indigo color palette is specified by the user and must be used; do not substitute other color schemes.
nonGoals: No server-side form handling or email submission
No CMS or dynamic content management
No user authentication or login system
No database or backend data storage
No blog or news section unless explicitly requested later

required: Futuristic dark blue and deep indigo abstract hero background with glowing neural network node connections, subtle grid lines, and geometric tech shapes (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
